abilities.name: Biggest Hat
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, up to three friendly Bayou Gremlins that have activated this turn no longer count as having activated this turn.

abilities.name: "Handle It, Kid"
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (t) to have a friendly Bayou Gremlin within 10" be dealt the damage instead.

abilities.name: Home on the Bayou
abilities.text: This model receives a (+) to opposed duels while on the friendly table half.

actions.name: Boomer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this attack receives, it deals +1 damage to enemy models within (x)1" of the target

triggers.name: 'Expert' Shot
triggers.text: After failing, deal 1 damage to an ally engaged with the target to have it declare a (melee) attack, which receives +1 Dmg.

triggers.name: "Clobber 'Em!"
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage to the target for each friendly Bayou Gremlin within 3" of it, to a maximum of +3.

actions.name: Up 'n At 'Em
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 4". The target may be dealt 2 damage to declare a non-Charge action.

triggers.name: "Bring a Friend!"
triggers.text: Summon a Bayou Gremlin within 3" of the target.

actions.name: Gang Up on 'Em
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy only. This action has a raise value of 3. This action may not target the same model more than once per activation. Summon a Bayou Gremlin within 3" of the target. For each raise this action receives, summon one additional Bayou Gremlin within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Needs Supervision
triggers.text: Replace one of the summoned models with a Good Ol' Boy or Gremlin Crier. It heals 2 and gains a Summon token.
